Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. 1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists that the work is divided into two main parts: theoretical and practical. It then says the theoretical part is divided into three parts. So it lists main sections: theoretical and practical; within theoretical: three subparts. It doesn't list practical parts. So partially lists. But question: "Does the text list the main sections of the thesis?" It lists two main sections: teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. So yes, it lists main sections. So compliance: true.

But maybe they want to list all main sections. It lists two. So yes. So compliance true.

Feedback: mention that it lists two main parts, but not the practical part's subparts.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes contents of the theoretical part's three subparts: general evacuation principle, analysis of Xiaomi arena plans, other studies. So yes, it briefly describes each subpart. So compliance true.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It says two main parts, theoretical and practical, and theoretical part has three subparts. But practical part not described. So general structure partially clear but missing details. So compliance maybe false. But question: "Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text?" The text gives some structure but not fully. I'd say not fully clear. So compliance false.
